game.name: Serada 9 Sector
game.description:
This is a battle for the Serada 9 Sector. The battle will be won when one commander captures 200 planets, or an alliance of two commanders capture 250 planets and hold them for 5 consecutive turns. This battle will run every day for 15 turns and then will drop to 3 turns per week.

Fight or Fail! You must control at least the number of planets shown to stay alive in this game. The Fight or Fail limit will increase every 5 Turns.

Accelerated Start! You can play your first 3 turns immediately, without having to wait for other players.

[2024 Standard Rules]

messages.headline: VGA Planets Nu
messages.body: Your alliance currently controls enough of the planets to win this sector. You must continue to hold for 0 more turns to gain total control of the Serada 9 Sector and be victorious!

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: Thank you for reaching out to me and taking me with you on long road to victory for this game.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: Correction: GA on 2 of your planets.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
No more requests.

If it goes as planned I will take 4 CoM planets this turn. Also trying to take some Bird planets. And p 31 from the Lizards. GA on 1 of your planets too if I counted correctly. Will see what happens.

Marking turn ready now.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
D19s can stay - this is the last turn so it wont matter if cloaked ships remain at p273, and if he attacks p52 better they be there to at least provide token resistance

Moved s172 to WW

Mines laid

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Attacking p 205 indeed.

Will you tow the D19b's from p 52 to p 273 or will they receive fuel?

Vicky 374 to p 277.

SSD 173 to ww p 5?

MCBR 463 to lay a big Fury minefield please.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: and you should take the colonies planets you are in a position to take.  I will take only 1, so there is still a 11 margin colonies over liz, so should be fine for you to take a few

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: I will attack p273 and set PE Liz on most gorbies in the colonies area in case he tires cloaked GAs on any of them

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: I assume you will attack p205 ?

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Goign to do a very quick pass then mark ready again.  Let me know if you have requests.  1 more turn only

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: Looks ok. Marking my turn ready now.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Marked complete.  If you have any further requests let me know but do not mark your own turn complete.  I'm hoping these last few turns can be done quickly over the weekend but we'll see

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
Only two turns left after this one, so really this is probably the last turn on which chunnels will be worthwhile.

Chunneloing FCC 433 at p172 to FCC 460 at p509 as requested.

Also chunneling FCC 434 to FCC 460 at p590 form just outside the WW of p344. Your ships at p270 can set FC 460 and catch it. I'll take a couple gorbies also. I have transferred 160 fuel to D19 #21 and 149 to Vicky #232

MCBR cloaking to p4 as requested

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: Perhaps also chunnel from p 344 to p 509?

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Chunnel FCC 433 from p 172 to FCC 433 at p 509 please.

MCBR 463 not to lay mines this turn but cloacking to p 4.

Vicky 374 goes back to p 5.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: ok - marked my turn as not ready again.  Let me know...

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: Please wait till I have thought about chunneling some ships from p 172 south.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: chunneling a couple more gorbies to the FCC in the WW of p376 just in case

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Yes, but fine I think.  I'm not goig to do much.  Just hover threateningly over the Colonies planets I'm at.  Will probably mark complete again soon.  Let me know if you have requests

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: Bit more firework than I expected.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: Marking turn ready now.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Going to the west was just a thought. No need to upset relations with Forger.
Will see if ships from p 172 can chunnel somewhere useful next turn.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: I am advancing to a bunch of Colonies planets but passively (not setting Kill or PE).  This way I can be in position to take 6 or so next turn if we need them, but not take them off Nocere if we don't.  I am still IAing one planet though. You should go ahead and take what you can - he is 14 ahead of Liz so will be fine at least for this turn.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
p431 FC set to Ald

D19 #439 ->p400

MCBR #463 taken on 119 torps (spent cash to tech up the SB) moving to (2885,2003) cloaked

I would prefer not to chunnel you into ex-Borg space as that area is kind of demilitarized by agreement with Bird. Although I have not agreed NOT to bring you in up there I feel it would upset relations at a point when it has no material impact on the end result for anyone's position.

Towing Vicky #504 to p450 as suggested

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Vicky 232 + D19b go to p 270. Maybe chunnel somewhere useful next turn?

Tow warp 6 Vicky to p 450? It can transfer fuel.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Agree there should be awards for Nocere.

FC at p 431 to Ald please. Beaming up fuel and supplies.

IA p 447. Gorbie 308, SSD 451 and some Vickies dir p 494.

IA p 135. Gorbie 391, SSD 427 and Vickies dir p 229.
DS 427 cloacking to p 321. L DSF 458 planned for GA 2 turns from now.

D3 534 cloacking to p 31. GA 2 turns from now. D19b 439 best to p 400.

Suggest change FC at p 279 to NUK or ATT.

Vicky 374 (PE Liz) towing D19b 109 (trg Kill zero fuel) from p 5 to p 227.

5 Vickies and 2 D19b moving from p 478 to p 76. Going to beam up fuel next turn and go dir p 420.

D3 476 stays cloacked at p 280 (not dropping the 4 clans this turn).

MCBR 463 to cloack and go east to lay Fury minefield SE of p 280 is my idea but perhaps you see other options.

Beaming up fuel and D at p 312 with matching FC f3L.

Where will FCC 409 be next turn? Perhaps chunnel FCC 433 from p 172 next turn so I can have a go at 1 or 2 Bird planets in the west.

Forgot to set trg on another D19b at p 19 last turn. Just have to wait and see if a ship will be towed or not this turn.

Pb builds of D19b's at p 172, 19 and 5.

Dropping clans on your planets 91, 57, 366 and 397.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
Nocere reached out to me and asked if we could see our way to keeping him clear of the Lizard to finish 4th. He stated he is just end-turning now. Since he was kind enough to fill in for Root at my request I would like to see him finish 4th not 5th ideally. I told him that provided we felt it did not impact our safety margin we would try to keep him above the Lizard. This means we should go somewhat slow, though I think we should assume a slow loss to Bird and/or Liz possibly elsewhere, so we should not stop entirely. Maybe take another 5 planets from him and then monitor the situation to ensure we have a good margin.
You should take priority over me in this, so let me know what you plan to take and I'll moderate my actions accordingly.

I was planning to attack p31 with s439 BTW, but s 534 can come in for a ground assault anyway the following turn, or I can just take s439 back to p400 and leave p31 for your ground assault the following turn (perhaps a better choice?)

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: The pops worked - not quite enough to hold the planet, but enough to kill both Rexes

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: Marking turn ready now.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: Ship 534 is a D3 with heavy blasters. It is sweeping but only 392 mines per turn.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Will DS 534 be sweeping or cloaking this turn? With the gorbies sweeping on p52 he liely cannot create much of a minefield with theRexes if the DS sweeps, which makes the pop intercept much more attractive.  I have no way to guess which planet he might attack, so popping in situ is not very attractive.  Also just letting him attack is not very attractive either, so I still feel like the double intercept and pop is the right play, but probably only if your DS is sweeping - let me know please

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
MCBR 463 perhaps to p 378 I meant.

Not sure if you should intercept those T-Rex with a D19b. You could run into a minefield. If you expect an attack on p 31 or p 400 you could also pop without moving. It is a gamble.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
Gorbie #173 gifted, PE LIz
IW #453 PFC changed to MoL on its way to p5

At p435 off-loaded SFT cargo as its prorbaly slightly safer on the planet, but ot moving anything

Is p372 a typo - its a long way to go and does not have that much cash really. p76 seems more logical (short distance and lots of cash and minerals)

Thinking maybe D19 #498 (and maybe #377 as well?) should intercept the Rexes and pop. What do you think? He is likely to attack either p31 or p400 so good chance both score hits. If he is not carrying supplies maxxed SB then should kill both I think. Can move D19s that are further north in the chain in that direction to replace

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: And FC at your p 31 and 400 to NUK or ATT I think to prevent GA.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: IA on p 178 and 351. P 447 and 135 next turn.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
p 372 because of the mc? D3 476 cloacks back to p 280.

Suggest you spend mc/supplies at p 31 and 400 on beam tech. Remainibg mc/supplies on other tech or torpedoes. Maxed SB should take the 1st T-Rex down.

LDSF, MDSF and 2 probes dropping clans on 4 of your planets. 4 planets planned for next turn (1 of those by a NFC in the north).

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
DS 76 still cloacking to p 427. Worst case scenario is that it hits a mine but I have more DS in the area.

FC p 5 changed to MoL. Perhaps better gift warp 1 Gorbie 127 to me with PE Liz. I will set it to Kill mission next turn then.

SB order Force Surrender at p 435 will happen before movement. If DW tries to tow a D19b or the DS it will be an EE ship.

D19b transferring the 40 clans to Gorbie 114 now at p 52.

MCBR 463 to lay approx 2700 Fury mines to expand minefield 682 to 100 ly. Perhaps go to p

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: DS 76 maybe go populate p427?  It wont be able to maintain clans there for long, but long enough now the countdown is begun

327.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Let's try to get this game over asap. More planets for me is nice but my main objective is the diplomatic victory. Achievement points will come over time anyway in other games.

Lizards trying to avoid poppers I guess. When facing Gorbies + GD all options are bad really for Lizards if they have to use Lizard ships only. (In another game I am playing Lizards and the opposing side has Biocides + GD. Hopeful that a stack of Rushes can become Lizard though.)

How much fuel to LDSF 57? Clans?

Pb of NFC at p 329. Lot of fuel still at p 466. Perhaps you can build a NRS at p 311?

SSD 461 will arrive at p 178 this turn. IA next turn.

Gorbie 391 to p 361. IA next turn.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
Golf has been the best ally I could have wished for and has acted for our joint progress throughout, so I will certainly respect that and go for the joint win.

I know the binds of our earlier agreement have been uncomfortable, so I also want to thank you for sticking by it.

mymessages.headline: The Empire of the Birds (forger)
mymessages.body:
Kosh

Looks like we are nearing the end. Are you going to go for a team win or a solo win?
Either way you earned it.

Regards
Forger

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Realistically we're not going to be able to transfer enough planets to get you past Forger unless you want us to go slow for a bit...?  However you are now past Colonies with good momentum

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: On the whole even better than I expected. The GA was mildly irritating but easily recaptured, and the lizard's battle order and deployment played completely into our hands

Similarly I have gifted the LDSF at p20 and lited 1200 clans onto it (leaving about 50 you can GA over next turn). Again I have fully fueled the probe so I suggest it goes and takes over p462 next

Most ideally one of your D19s from p19 could intercept one of my gorbies (say 114) this turn so I could tow it in when I return

1 gorbie and one FCC from p431 headed to p329 carrying moly and to ensure a defensive force there for your arrival. LDSF also goping to pick up trit to take to p40. Another gorbie and another FCC headed to p40 with some clans and the intention of chunneling the FCC out next turn

I am PBing two utility ships this turn (an LDSF in the ex-Fed HW cluster, and a neutronic carrier in my home area), so unsure if we'll get RBs or not. I suspect we will but cannot be certain. If we do I have 4 gorbies queued up

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
Ok. I wil build an SB at p329 this turn. Won't impact your takeover but it can at least build 3 fighters before you take over that way. I suspect the Lady Royale has poor engines, but I will tow it first anyway (I also considered laying mines in case it tries to long move but the gemini at p482 likely has a lot of fighter sweep power so no point). If it tries to tow me it will likely go for either the SSD or the FCC, so I will have the SSD long-move tow the FCC to be sure. Conveniently a long tow is avaialble that stil arrives at p338, so that is where they will go along with the 2 gorbies.

Your 4000 mine lay is probably too much as I think that will put the edge of your field (pre-elimination) within 100ly of the gemini on p482, so I think you should reduce it a bit. Your goal after all is just to intersect his field #620

Gorbie #452 is long-move towing SSD #90 towards p166 and gorbie #13 is attempting to tow the gemini to the same spot. The geminio could long move and break tow, but nothing I can about that.

SB 260 force surrender confirmed

H-Ross 335 gift and no move confirmed

STF#159 arriving p21. My D19 will just move to the edge of the WW in case a Bird pps yours this turn. Once the planet is transferred I will move mine in

p360 will certainly cost him a DW, which remains a good trade.

LDSF #34 headed to cluster of p20, ready for evantiual hand over to you. Similarly MDSF #210 for planets near p486. Try to get probes out to those clusters in the next 2 or 3 truns if you can. Let me know if we need to arrange some probe meetups to gift. p296 clustr can also be transferred

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
STF 159 and D19 headed toward p21 with 699 clans 140 supplies, 638mc

If I lay fury mines at p176 they will mutually eliminate with bird field 611 leaving about 3000 mines. That's probably what you intend, but just checking...I have given that order anyway unless told otherwise. MCBR flying. back to p58 also for two reasons - first so that if the resolute makes it cloaked to p176 it's not obvious to him what laid the mines; and second because it can at least partially re-arm there (not much D but at least some - perhaps one of your ships could bring some extra D from p478?). I think the gorbie can stay there for now. Will bring the MDSF as you suggest

Gorbie 442 can move too. Not enough room for clans. Perhaps MDSF 186 can start moving dir p 176? D3 476 will cloak to p 176.

250 fuel to IW 385 confirned.

One of the Vickies heading for p 497 will got to

mymessages.body: Could you transfer 250 fuel to it please

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Oh nvm - w6 gorbie.  I guess we let him decide to attack the planet in his own time. I'll take the IllWind back south I think

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Will you intercept virgo 202?  If so would you like me to do the same with the IllWInd to make sure?

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Ok on the meteor minelay suggestion and confirming the STF move

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
I would not worry about probe #76 - not like it can do anything really. I think the DS is probably better employed scouting. However, if you prefer to deal with the probe I have no objection

Going back to what I suggested earlier - propose I move SSD#427 to (1659,1133) and your ships also head there (with some clans) then next turn I gift it to you and you tow it in to p497. Suggest I also gift you gorbie #391 and move it to the same spot, just in case there is a virgo in the p497 cluster

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
I am going to p431 without PE (taking the SSD) and also to p329 with 2 gorbies in straight attack mode.

s47 group etc will go to p59 no PE taking SSD and towing the4 FCC also. Gorbies at p298 will attack p219

IA at p320 and moving fuel up to there from p167 along with one of the FCCs (other should probably chunnel out so your ships need to not be at w0 if they stay there). DS explore p497 cluster?? You could either hold with your ships to see what the DS finds or just head that way immediately. I can gift you one of the gorbies and/or the IAing SSD from p320 could meet you in deep space to be gifted to you so you can IA p497 and p26 (let me know what you want)

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
Regarding the meteor. I guess we can do that (let me know where you think it would be best positioned). Counter-arguments would be:
1) I can only lay mines in your name if I lay all torpedos, which means eitehr a side trip to a SB I own each time, or laying them from the location of one of my SBs (which is generally likely a bit less useful since he won't be attacking those anyway)
2) It's not really symmetrical with lizard giving bird lokis, because I don't have any agreement with the lizard, so one is the person with the agreement RECEIVING 3rd party help, the other is the perosn with the agreement GIVING that help. Having side that, ok, though with mild discomfort

Regarding longer term - I want to be in a position to transfer a bunch of safe planets to you. With the continuing erosion of Colonies' planet count it should not be hard to get you above him before the finish. Ideally also above Forger, though that may be harder to achieve. To this end I plan to send a bunch of freighters to the ex Fed area and my far northern area. You can meet them there with a probe or two (let me know if you need more probes transferring) to gift freighters to you for clan lift and ground assault. Mostly the actual transfers can wait until the final 5 turn countdown starts, but we need to get into position before that

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Going to p 115 indeed for IA next turn. Expect you are going to p 431 that shows a lot of fuel.

DS 473 cloacking dir p 394 to deal with B200 76.

2 Vickies and LDSF now at p 167 dir p 497. NFC and STF staying at p 167 (warp > 0).

DS199 will lays 1000 mines around p 478 and will go to ww.
Suggest MCBR 463 lays Fury minefield that does not overlap p 347 (transfer some torpedoes to SB at p 50) and goes to p 347 for minelaying there next turn.
Stack of Vickies going to p 347. D3 476 bringing mc to build SB.

STF 159 to continue to p 435. My D19b at this planet is not in trigger mode.

More later.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: Birds got some Loki's from the Lizards so I think it is fair if you help me a bit with mine laying.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: My idea for MCBR 463 is that it stays in your hands but lays Fury minefields. That way the Birds cannot shoot at the ship as long as you have safe passage but will have to deal with the mines. You can use your SB's to store torpedoes that you do not want to be converted to Fury mines in a particular turn and use the SB load torpedoes order to transfer torpedoes back to the MCBR after mine laying and movement. Also Fury Deth Specs could try to scoop mines and lay minefields again elsewhere.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: I assume you will go to p115 for IA.  I will not go there so we can avoid any possibility of a NUK

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Virgo 202 looks a bit short on fuel also

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Both gorbies nearby intercepting virgo 149 again to keep it under fuel pressure

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Meteor #463 fueled and has 73 Mk VII (after tihs turn).  If we want to use it for cloaked mine laying it's probably better in your hands as I have safe pasage with bird.  I can broing it somewhere to give to you (eitehr gift to ship of fly to one of your SBs).  Let me know...

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: Could have done a bit better in ww p 19. Things happen. Move on to this turn.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: That was a little more painful, but glad I made those intercept attempts - he is getting low on fuel to run now and has no cobol

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: ok. -taking 200 clans, 400 supplies and 1400mc to p221

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: H-ross 335 - I think I will head towards p351 and then further south as that is where you WILL need fighters. Taking it north feels like moving defenses in th wrogn direction. My safe passage with Bird should mean its fairly safe headed that way...?

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: Going to sleep now and marking my turn ready.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: You could take some clans to p 221 to drop on my 1 Fury clan next turn. You would lose about 5 clans because of the Fury defense bonus. The D7 goes NW to GA Bird planets in the near future.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: ok thanks - I'll se what I can do about MCBR mine laying

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Vicky 475 will sweep 1960 mines from field 575 this turn. This ship will move south a little bit.

MCBR 463 could perhaps lay mines in name af Fury. You have minerals and mc on some planets in the area.

Interception of Virgo and Loki by Gorbies quite speculative. These ships are quite likely to move out of range this turn. But perhaps you can get that Loki a turn later.

D7 now in ww p 221 sweeps a few mines. Planet itself should just be clear.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
Speculative:

LDSF #135 towing gorbie#301 to p221 (with an extra 30 fighters beamed in from p376)
Gorbie 304 headed to replace it at p12 (topped up by fighters from p384)
Gorbie 114 intercepting the virgo at w9
Gorbie 332 intercepting the loki at w9

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Not sure as to best use now of meteor #463. Any suggestions?

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
towing STF #159 to p359 (on way to p435) with D19 180

Gorbie 338 group mostly moving to intercetion of fields 575,584 to sweep

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: ok on the proposed chunnel - will do so.  Make sure to set FC=408 for any ships wishing to go

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: where should H-ross 335 head with fighters next?

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: See my earlier message. FCC 329 receives 407 fuel and can chunnel to FCC 408 at p 167. My other ships at p 172 already are moving to p 505.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: p172 - we need to evac THIS turn.  That class 5 storm will be on us if we do not (storms move first then damage).  Suggest we chunnel one FCC witn the militray ships and evac the other and any non-military ships to p505.  Let me know if you have a preference about where to chunnel to.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Chunnel FCC 329 at p 172 to FCC 408 at p 167?
FCC 329 receives 407 fuel.
FCC 433 receives 50 fuel.
Got 2 maxed Vickies, 1 LDSF and 1 STF full with clans and fuel and a NFC ready for chunneling.
My ships that are not chunneling from p 172 go to p 505 to get out of the path of ion storm. Suggest FCC 433 goes there too. Moving from p 505 next turn because of 2nd ion storm.

IA on p 415. My ships staying there this turn with the exception of a Vicky going a little bit south to sweep mines next turn.

Perhaps STF 159 can be towed to p 435 for planet/SB takeover? Maybe we just have enough time before DW arrive.

D19b at p 509 is in trigger mode.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Running low on resources at p 19 with all those DW that keep visiting. Cloacked intercept of damaged D7 by DW triggered GD. New D19b available at p 19 but not building one there this turn.
In the SE I am without Vickies now so sooner or later DW will be able to destroy SB's. Maybe we should look at the possibility of making a few planets EE over there.

Still: nice to see some DW and Virgo's going down.

Your IW did not get torps from SB at p 388. Just had a look at the host order: primary SB orders are after movement. If IW comes back it will receive the torps just after arriving.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
SB 388 order Load torpedoes and FC nUk confirmed.

LDSF 30 moves as EE ship to p 31.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
p146 force surrender set
p400 STF loaded 1 clan and transferred 200 fuel to the LDSF
IW #385 FC set to nUk moving away. Please confirm SB set to load torps

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: Already 985 fuel to Gorbie 92. Suggest you start to send fighters to this ship.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Your plan with the 3 Gorbies that are with Cobol 194 looks ok.

Gifting H-Ross 335 to you at p 146. Please set SB order Force Surrender.

Gifting LDSF 30 to you at p 400. Please load a clan to one of your ships in orbit there. LDSF 30 will need sime fuel to go to p 31 on its own or has to be towed there.

FC p 388 will stay nUk. Loading 231 fuel to IW 385.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
The 3 gorbies with cobol 194 canot really do a great deal as I doubt anything will stay in range. The cobol may try to tow the damaged gorbie so it is taking all the supplies (repairs to 14% allowing w9) and trying to tow the cobol to p315, aiming for the far side of the WW so it's a long move. If he tries to move or tow without kit. being a long move we will get the cobol. If he long-move tows then both will break tow. One of the other gorbies will intercept the damaged one. The remaining will move back to p509

Does this sound sensible to you?

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: FCC 329 chunneling to FCC 433 at p172 - seems a decent sugestion indeed.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: FCC 329 perhaps to p 172?

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Battle order of Lizards quite in your advantage ;-).

Birds took some PP by killing a Vicky but my SB got the DW.

First step of getting my cloackers back to p 19 quite ok. Only 1 mine hit (D7). At p 19 a Swift Heart triggered another GD.. Hope I can keep up with making new D19b's.

Going to p 415 this turn. No PE set. Battle order: mk 8 Vicky, Gorbie, mk 8 Vicky, mk 4 Vickies.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Changed FC at p 388 after building a D19b. Will keep it the aame now for a few turns.
Evening over here so I am marking my turn ready.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: gorbie 308 fleet - what's your battle order?  Since your gorbie will not get left side (at least automatically) best have 1 vicky in front of it

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Did you chnage the FC of p388 last turn?  The torpedo load failed to happen.  I'll bring the IIlwind back again

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Ships near p 234 moving dir p 19. Will be met by Instrumentality + D19b.. Keeping the Gorbie at p 19 to defend. D19b from ww will go bak to p 19.

Gifting H-Ross 335 to you at p 146.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
Transferred 20 more fighters to your gorbie #20 (please ensure there is room). Both FCCs to the WW (NE and NW 1ly). Small minefield laid since the enemy carriers appear to all be lizard now. If possible please load some torp build materials to FCC#460 (it is set to mkT and has 9K cash). Just 30 or 40 of each is fine. All 3 of my gorbies intercepting virgo #51. FC's on the gorbies are 007,005,008 (in their id order). The one with 005 is relatively light on fuel (270) as it could well die.

Bird lokis is unfortunate but not really surprising I guess. Since loki will decloak you even if you move away your ships near p224 are in danger of being intercepted this turn. You might consider moving them back towards p19 and intercepting with the gorbie (or at least the instrumentality) and the D19. ALso maybe lay some mines around p19 this turn since I don't see Colonial carriers obviously nearby (as a hedge against moving the d19 away)

Plan for gorbie 308 fleet seems good. My plan for this area is to sort out my ful via a few chunnels. This turn I am towing one FCC with the meteor to 394 and moving the FCC currently there to p451 (towed by the SSC). Getting the gorbie mostly repaired at p451 (next turn will be able to complete repair and they will tow the FCC out to strike distance of p431). Will then chunnel up the gorbies from p394 to attacki.
One gorbie at p44 is towing the FCC up to within strike of p219 and p59. Next turn gorbies from p330 will chunnel in along with the one coming back from the debris disk with full fuel tanks and the gorbie escorting he FCC this turn will attack p298.
This should provide plenty of cover for your fleet to attack p415 with intent to IA
SFF #545 moving to p44 to provide fuel for second gorbie to move up to cover the chunnel in with shields up next turn. It is sweeping
Gorbie #354 to p490 as you suggest

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Fleet with Gorbie 308 moves a little bit closer to p 415 again.
34 fuel to STF 545. Scoop mines?
Perhaps Virgo 344 will go dir already conquered planets. Gorbie 354 to p 490?

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: Trouble for my cloackers. Birds have Loki 358 now. Also Loki at p 224.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
75 clans seen at p 298.

Think you should intercept some of that Lizard ships near p 509 indeed.
Please do not chunnel away from p 509. Lizards might attack p 509 and in that case we want more defending ships than just Gorbie 20.
Both FCC to ww or somewhere else safe I suggest.
125 supplies go to FCC 329. 967 fuel to your highest ID Gorbie 332.
LDSF 458 intercepting FCC 329 at warp 1.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: What was the population at p298?

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Enemy ships near p509 stayed within range last turn.  Think we should intercept this turn?

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Pity I overlooked that DS that got towed the previous turn. Anyway: 3 DW down, you took down some Virgo's and I only lost a Vicky and that DS.
And I might be in a bit of trouble with the Birds now they have Loki's. Some ships already got decloacked.
And we do not know if there is a cloaked ship at p 509 that could tow away a ship. Not very likely though because the Birds usually arrive with all DW uncloacked and set to attack.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Another mixed, but overall good turn I think

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Sorry - was in work meetings.  I assume you went ahead and beamed up fuel - I will not mess with the planet FC (nuK)

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: Going to sleep. Marking turn ready.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: Bram up fuel from p 488 possible?

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
FCC 67 ok to chunnel away indeed.
In a few turns perhaps a FCC can go to p 172 to fetch some ships with a lot of fuel.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Do you think FCC #67 needs to stay there given we have FCC#329 quite close by and another chunneling to it this turn?  I really need some spare CCCs to move around to be able to distribute gorbies...

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Vickies will go Loki hunting and the MDSF will bring clans as you suggested.
Will check for new messages 2 hours from now.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
Confirming D19 stay at p426

Vickies at p488 might as well go hunt down that loki I think. I assume MDSF from p363 will bring some clans back down to this cluster?

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: Correction: 1200 T to p 400.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: gorbie 92 headed direction of p172 since it might as well be with that FCC I think

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
290 supplies to FCC via LDSF confirmed. Also no tow. Please keep the D19b at p 426. SB set to unload cargo - probe with 10.000 mc arriving this turn.

At the backdoor my ships will travel a few ly closer to p 415 while sweeping mines.

Still thinking about what to do with the stack of Vickies at p 488. Suggestions?

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: why take M to p400?  The SFT already there has 584T, 267M

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: 50 fuel and 109M to LDSF #16.  Let me know if this is not enough fuel

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: IllWind #385 matched FC - however do not force surrender. Set SB to load torpedos - according to the doc this should work for matching FC even if not yours and allows the ship to move this turn. Please also transfer 200 fuel (to b clear FC is set to pB2)

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Ok. Changed FC Vicky to 002 and FC Gorbie 20 is alphabetic now. Both with Kill mission.

SB order at p 388 is Force Surrender. Transfer IW 385 to me so I can load it with torpedoes?

If possible 109 M to LDSF 16 at p 376 and some fuel to fly back to p 5. Need some M to build a D19b.

LDSF 30 with 1200 M going to p 400 to be gifted to you.

Unloading 482 T and 420 M to p 17. Also 453 fuel to keep it safe from the Birds.

At p 119 Gorbie 92 receives 124 fuel.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: er FCC I mean

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Of course make sure gorbie 329 is not under tow by any of your ships

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
Oh two other things about this fight:
1) Could you transfer as many supplies as possible to the damaged FCC (329) [which has unloaded its cargo to the planet, so if you transfer via the LDSF I think it should work]
2) Do you think I should bring the D19 rom p426 set to trg Liz? If so please also transfer a few supplies (10 is enouhg) to gorbie #114

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
I would put the vicky first because likely he will set the Rex first as a shield scratcher and ut defuses that significantly. Based on sims his best battle order is Rex,Virgo,Rex,Virgo,Mad and against that outr best is Vicky, Gorbie (mine), Gorbie (yours), Gorbie (incoming no shields). There is still a small chance we lose, so I will chunnel 2 gorbies in which makes things certain.
For FCs:
Vicky: 002 (it wants the right side anyway) [Kill]
Gorbie #114: 007 (just because!) [Kill]
Gorbie #20: non-numeric [KIll] (hope to get left side)
Incoming gorbies - one PE Colonoes, one PE Liz, non-numeric
Incoming FCC - arrives out of fuel

How does this sound?

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Chunnel 1 Gorbie to p 509 I think.

Battle order I suggest:

Gorbie 20 with FC 901
Gorbie 114
Gorbie chunneling to p 509
Vicky 267 wit FC 997

Question is if we want to set no PE, specific PE or Kill missions. Also FC p 509 NUK/ATT or not.
And if we want to leave fuel in orbit or on the planet.
For now I have set my ships on Kill mission and the SB on NuK and am storing the fuel on the planet.

FCC 329 to unload all minerals and mc.
LDSF 458 will try to load 290 supplies to FCC 329.

Will chance it with the probe jumping to p 509 with 10.000 mc ((SB has order to unload) if you chunnel an extra Gorbie there.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: I am going to lay all my torps as mines from IlWInd #453 and SFF #426 (10K mines total).  One gorbie will intercept the T-Rex at w7.  I lack fuel to be more ambitious and also dont want to wind up at a location wherethe T-rex makes it back and meets the larger fleet to the SW moving in

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: good question - I could chunnel more gorbies in from p270, though I would rather take a couple of those out to FCC #486, or bring one gorbie from either p508 or p418.  What do you think kis needed there?

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: Will be marking my turn ready in about 30 minutes.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: Force Surrender set at p 501.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: set SB at p501 to force surredner an I will empty the H-ross of fuel so you can take fighters

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: DS 39 minesweeping indeed.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
Moving FCC #488 to p44 so that I will be able to chunnel in more fuel. Ships at the planet holding this turn.
Moving 2 gorbies and SSD to p490 (no PE) with lots of fuel on the second gorbie
Moving most ships near p394 to the planet (no PE). FCC is towed. SSD is towed. Meteor towing the other FCC to (1526,1030)

Near p376:

1) Illwind and Cruiser both intercepting the out-of-fuel loki, to which I have transferred one fuel (we could take it for force capture but lizard and bird both loki immune and you re not so better we kill it I think)
2) Gorbies #168 and #198 meeting up near minefield #511 to swep it and share fuel to come home (also sweeping field 495 this turn, but I imagine your DS is anyway)

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: Vicky 267 towing FCC 329 to p 509. LDSF beaming up fuel with matching FC and also back to p 509.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
Note - I have retained the Moly, most trit and the cash on the FCC since (being towed) it should be the safest of all and these seem like the highest priority minerals.

Hmm slight change - the vicky needs fuel and I only have one foreign transfer target. Accordingly I have changed to transfer 289 fuel and 60 moly to the vicky. The FCC is loaded up with the rest of the moly, all the trit and a little duranium (which we dont much need) as well as all the cash. It also has full fuel tanks. This leaves 91 fuel on the planet which the LDSF can beam up. This way the vicky can tow the FCC and we still get the important minerals

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
Headed towards p415 seems fine.

Not a lot of useful minerals available at p384 to take to p505, but probably best to take what there is and cease attempting fighter production at p385. I will load up the LDSF and repair the FCC. Please tow the FCC with the vicky and all can go back to p505 (the two gorbies there should be adequate shield)

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Gifting STF 159 and D19b at p 400 to you to keep them safe from the Birds. Your D19b 337 already has a clan on board. Next turn you can tow the STF north with fuel and T.

Fuel and minerals to LDSF 458 at p 384 to take to p 509? Probe with 10.000 mc will arrive at p 509 in 2 turns.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Unless you have other plans ships now at p 496 will go dir p 415. SSD will IA first of course. The 2 mk 8 Vickies now at p 44 will join them.
2 mk 4 Vickies + B200 will go from p 466 to p 496. Merlin and 1 mk 4 Vicky stays at p 466 this turn.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: Keeping the Vickies at p 488. Intercepting the Loki might turn into a goose chase if it stays in the ww. Will not beam up fuel yet from p 488 this turn but the next. If Virgo 1 goes to p 488 the first 2 Vickies probably will go down. Remaining ships should have enough room for the fuel from p 488 next turn.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
Your ships ids mean that you cannot use the vickies at p488 to extend a minefield laid by DS 199 so far as I can see. A minefield centered on p488 is not useful because th star cluster is too close for it to be large enough to still help much after the virgo sweeps (he can sweep about 3300 mines). Also the DS laying means it cannot cloak.

I think we just drive him out of fuel and not worry about mines this turn. I will attack p312 this turn. Either he runs (with only 16 fuel picked up from p312) and gets chased down when he runs out, or he goes back to p348 (where there is no fuel), or he fights, or he goes to p488 and dies to your vickies if they stay there. I suggest (whetehr you stay to fight or not) that the last-in-battle-order vicky beams up fuel (after transferring all but 1 to the others) so that there is none left on the planet.

You might consider intercepting the loki with the vickies. If you do then probably all of them in case he moves the loki to the virgo, but not at the planet where my gorbie will go. That could mean that p488 is left undefended and gets attacked, but if so we lose 1 SB (not a huge deal) and we loses the loki and gets the virgo damaged and still has no fuel to pick up, so easy for the gorbie to mop up. In this case maybe your DS is better at p488 than at p312, since my gorbie wil be covering p312 anyway

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: LDSF 101 brings minerals for SB to p 17. Also shuttles some fuel to a planet of yours.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Ok turn indeed. DS with damage intercepted by DW but that had to be expected.

My plan is to keep the Birds as busy as possible at the front so they cannot send much more ships to take planets from me. Also to move some fuel to your planets if possible.

Any idea on how we can prevent Virgo 1 (now at p 312) to become a minesweeper for the 3 DW now at p 76?
3 Vickies staying at p 488 this turn. Vicky 382 and accompanying ships will join them with the 3xception of DS 199 that cloaks (Birds) to p 312 with a few clans. Can your Gorbie 442 also go to p 312 (Kill!)?

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Another pretty good turn

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: Yes. Marking turn ready now.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Ready to mark complete?

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Ok - MDSF #186 holding position.  Taking on only fuel just so its not on the planet

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
LDSF 458 tows FCC 329 to p 384. Vicky 267 goes to p 384 too.

No fuel needed for DS 473. Laying big minefield around p 372.

I think MDSF 186 better leaves the clans at p 17. Amorphous at p 50 quite unhappy and probably will eat more than 5 clans per turn. My nearby LDSF can bring materials to build a SB at p 17 in a few turns. Think we best have well defended planets or stripped planets. Not something in between that the Birds can take over easily.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: MDSF #186 movign to p50 with 124 clans, 74 supplies, 769mc.  STay where you are with the probe and keep your clans on board.  I'll giftb the MDSF next turn and you can take the planet sustainably

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Does DS 473 want some of the fuel?

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: In fact, because of this I have change so that the IllWind intercepts my gorbie, since the cruiser is enough for the loki.  Note that the loki's mass went UP this turn, so a cloaked LCC must have been with it last turn (probably LCC 481 which I imagine intercepted the cobol)

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: I ran the simulation.  Gorbie + IllWind vs 2 Rexes and a Mad - gorbie survives only about 20% if first.  68% if second

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
The low FC on IllWind #453 was intentional, as I wanted a shield scratcher in front of the gorbies. I think Rex, Rex, Mad will kill a gorbie, especially as they are currently rather low on fighters. However, I think I need to beam more fighters to them to address the second part (will take the fighters from p305, and a bunch from gorbie 301 I think [p384 can beam some replacements in]). I may even need to use the cash at p374 to buy some!
With that accounted for I will run some sims and optimize the battle order for the IllWind on the assumption that they will meet 2 Rexes and a Mad + a few support ships

I cannot move FCC #329 to p384 since its top speed with the damage is w8. I assume you are raiing he LDSF this turn, so (since repair is beore movement) could you use it to tow the FCC to p384 please. I feel p384 is safer than p426. ALternatively it can get to p426 itself, but if I do that and do not move the gorbie (which I think really needs to stay at p509) I would want your Vicky to also move to p426 to give some cover. Problem is that neither planet is covered with respect to the Birds. Please let me know which option you prefer (or counter propose)

FCC 67 moving 1ly north in the WW

Gorbie 442 sweepign and attacking p348

Gorbie 92 repair by SB and takes on 1K fuel will intercept the loki. If I were to transfer torp materials to vicky 133 (so it has some after movement if it transfers what it has now) AND you lay all the torps on DS 235 and all the transferred torps from vicky 271 is it enough to get overlap so that you end up with a large field cenetred on the DS? If so that should trap his light ships...???

H-ross 108 dropping fuel and gifting

I will bring fighters for p501 this turn on the h-ross next door

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
FCC 329 to EE SB for repair?
FCC 67 receives 175 supplies.
Cannot gift D19b to you that are needed against Birds.

3 Vickies stay at p 488. Vicky 382 and some other ships going dir p 488. With DW approaching it is better to stack.

DS 235 rescued by Vicky 133 and DS 473. Not intercepting the Cobols near p 372 because the might want to escape through that minefield.

H-Ross 108 to drop most fuel and to be gifted to me please. Towing it north to give SB fighters.

Also fighters needed at p 501 and 92. Perhaps H-Ross 335 could go there. SB orders have been set to Force Surrender.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
FCC 329 to EE SB for repair? My D19b 197 at p 509 is trg Kill to keep the Birds out.
175 supplies to FCC 67. To stay in ww but move a little bit I suggest.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: 111 mk 8 torps at SB 388. Sure you want the IW that intercepts the Loki to have a lower FC than the Gorbies that go for Mad 63? Just in case Mad 63 and the T-Rex move to position Loki. I think it more likely though that a LCC will try to rescue the Loki.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
Slightly risky approach around p376. Here is what I propose:

1) Illwind #385 transfers a few torps to the other Illwind to leave itself with 225, and lays them as a max minefield, then heads back towards p388 since it has a fair number of torps on the SB (right?)
2) Illwind #453 intercepts Loki#484 (which is out of fuel but may try to regroup with the other ships). PE iliz, FC s set to 002
3) SSCruiser #121 also intercepts the loki (FC 101)
4) Gorbie 198 interceots Mad #63 at w7 (FC 015)
5) Gorbie #168 intercets Mad #63 at w9 (FC 010)
6) Gorbie #438 just moves to p144

What do you think?

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: Dark Sense shows a lot of fuel for p 466.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
No - I will IA p44 this turn. Want to have some fighter production and distribution points, so will be a mix of you and me IAing I think. All the ships at p44 will have to wait there this turn as fuel is not great - hoping the planet has some! Will move FCC#488 up a little so as to be withon 81ly in case we need to rely on chunnel to get fuel in.
Your orders sound good to me. Gorbies chunneling into FCC#183 have decent fuel load (3K)

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
P 44 target for SSD 461 after p 496?
2 mk 8 Vickies staying at p 44.
Merlin, B200 and 3 mk 4 Vickies staying at p 466.
DS cloacking to p 72 and another DS cloacking to p 298.
Please let me know if I should change this.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: IA at p 466. Gorbie, SSD and 2 mk 4 Vickies with some clans will go to p 496 or IA next turn.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Indeed bit messy but ok. GD damage to your ships at p 509 but I got the DW that was intercepting a DS. At p 466 one of the Gorbies was destroyed before the Virgo went down.
2 DS hit a mine.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Messy but I think good.  Basically most of the distributed threats are now eliminated.  Next turn I can Chunnel t maxed gorbies to the fcc in range of the WW of p394, and we have 3 imperial assaults guaranteed.  You can also move1 your ssd and gorbies up to p496 to repeat there.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: Marking turn ready now l.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Its goign to p146 since the gorbiue is giving chase on its own.  It can stay near there and also fill up with fuel

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: Where will MCBR 463 go to? Do not want to "trg" it

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
p375 buM confirmed

gorbie #114, FCC #329 and D19 #399 all moving to p505, so I have trG covered (at least against lizard)

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: I can intercept virgo 344with 4 gorbies.  If he moves off we waste some fuel, so its porbably not a bad idea as he is set to attack any of 4 planets.  I thought about a popper intercept but the only poppers near there are w7 and anyway may hit mines so probably better to leave them at those planets.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Lizard fleet near p 376?

Maxing SB at p 509 and maxing mines at planet to get fuel. Perhaps your Gorbie 114 could go there for future intercept of Virgo 51 or 149? In that case I will switch the D19b's off.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Vickies from p 312 tp p 488 taking all fuel. No PE set.
475 fuel going to Gorbie 442 now.

Vickies 475 and 496 to p 44 confirmed. FC 998 and 999. No PE. Pillage or not?

Thank you for Gorbie 435. Staying at p 388 for now. Pb build of warp 7 D19b with xrays at p 388.

Intercepting FC 67 with STF 193 at warp 1. Bringing 175 supplies.

If mc's not needed at p 375 BUM please.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Vickies #475 and #494 please also come to p44 this turn (with no PE and high numeric FC - the gorbies are 003 and 004)

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Small adjustment - attacking p44 (not p496, which I'll leave for you ideally)

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Please transfer any spare fuel to gorbie #442 to make sure of this

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
Doh. I'm sorry that was stupid of me. In that case I will attack both p496 and p422 (well, not attack, but passively go to, which may lead to combat since I am not immune)

40 fuel transferred to small transport #364. H-ross -> p383 as suggested. Fightrs gtransferred to p260 from p57 so all the ones he could attack are now maxxed.

Virgo 1 doesn't have access to much fuel so no rush I would say. Suggest remove all fuel from p312 and move vickies to defend p488. I'll move the gorbie on an intercept course under its own power from the north. He will run out of fuel before we do I think

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Did not nitice last turn SSD 461 is loaded with 40 supplies and 40 fighters. Staying at p 466 this turn together with the Gorbies waiting for the Merlin that has clans to arrive.
Mk 8 Vicky 475 and 494 will go to p 466 too unless you have another proposal.
Pillaging p 466 to get mc for torpedoes.

2 DS will keep intercepting Cobols with Virgo 96. PE set now. No idea if this fleet will go to a planet, further east or to the southwest.

2 or more fuel to Small Transport 364 at p 260 please. H-Ross 108 to p 383?

Thinking about intercepting Virgo 1 with the 3 Vickies now at p 312. Your thoughts?
400 fuel to Gorbie 442.
Lizard Loki 386 might lay a minefield so my advice is that MCBR 463 stays well clear.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
I guess there was a missing/wrong PE issue from both of us. I guess if you repeat the intercept this turn though he has no way to avoid it. Alternative would be to just cloak and if he tows you you'll arrive cloaked and still be with him.

I didnt notice the loki was a lizard one :-(. However I can just tow him as he has almost no fuel anyway (max of 11)

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
LDSF 16 does not get supplies. GA on p 388 with 9 clans. DS 402 goes SW.
Intercepting Cobols going with Virgo 96.
Marking turn ready.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: ok - done with my orders unless you have any requests

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Might as well gift the LDSF as it is not doing anything currently.  Save your supplies and only supply-repair the gorbie (in case of combat) which I'll keep.  SB repair has no cost next turn for the LDSF

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Have set FC of p505 to mfE since I am slightly concerned bird might try to change a FC somewhere to set a global MF code for Lizard or Colonies benefit.  If you have a high id planet (this one is my second highest - highest needs to be RB) somewhere away from Bird I suggest you do the same

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: You do not have to gift LDSF 16 and Gorbie 470 to me to be repaired. Already transferring enough supplies to these ships.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: meteor #463 towing gorbie #442 to p500, ready to tow it to p312 (probably) next turn.  Not much fuel he can get on p348 so we should be able to hunt him down now fairly easily

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: FCC #67 has transferred all clans to the SFT which I am gifting to you, so it has all its cargo space open for available supplies

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: gifting gorbie #470 and LDSF #16 to you so they can be repaired

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Virgos 33 and 160 went to one of the bird planets near p475 (stupidly I failed to do an intercept-track last turn so no sure which).  We may need to chunnel some forces to FCC 409 at some point.  It will stay in the WW for now

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: gorbie 92 is ow 13% damaged so sweepign and headed for p260.  I doubt he will intercept me so this should put it in a sensible location.  If he does attack me and win (only a 15% chance) at the very best for him he is extremely heavily damaged and will have nowhere to go to repair

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
Unfortunately IllWInd #453 only has i30 torpedos because I was expecting it to be a shield scratcher, so. it cannot lay mines to trap that loki if it moves NE. Could you bring DS 402 SW so it can lay mines if the loi does head out that way? I will intercept it and cover other directions.

At p388 I have dropped the minerals from the IllWind and gifted you the gorbie (PE liz). The planet has 1 clan so please GA with 9 (there are 92 more on the gorbie). The IllWind is leaving to meet up with the other just inn front of that ion storm with 260 mk VIII on board

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
Ok - so detailed coordinates so you know:

2 gorbies, 1 SSCruiser, 1 SSF (towed), 1 LDSF, 1 SSD (towed) moving to (1212, 1287)

2 gorbies and an SSD (300, 308, 461) gifted to you and moving to p466 all with no PE set. Ideally though you should tow the SSD with one of your vickies

2 gorbies and an SSD (towed) moving to (1234,1229) which will be in range if p422 and should allow some sweeping

MDSF taking fuel to the FCC and gorbie that were moving in behind since they are basically out of fuel

2 SSFs and 1 FCC just moiving up a little to (1213,1234)

2 FCCs chunneling out to FCC #489 from where 4 or 5 more gorbies can chunnel the following turn

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: I have set it to move itself, but if you tow it that would take precedence and probably b better

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: hmm, of course I cannot tow with a gifted ship, so the SSD will have to take its chances with mines.  Maybe one of your Vickies should tow it?  Do you have supplies on a Vicky that could tow s#461 into p466? (with no PE set of course)

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: MCBR + FCC > 81 ly p 394 good idea.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Thank you for the 2 Gorbies and the SSD at the backdoor.
1 DS will go in dir p 72. 2nd DS dir p 298.
2 mk 8 Vickies dir p 44.
Other Fury ships will go 65.4 ly dir p 466 (1220, 1252).

FCC 67 to ww p 19 and STF 193 gifted to me best I think. And chunnel in some minesweepers soon. Already 2 D7 on the way to p 19.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body:
I will gift you gorbies 300 and 308 and SSD 461 and move all 3 to p466. All will have immunity and all will be owned by you so will be attacked only ig he has ships with Kill or PE you, and the two gorbies will be in front of the SSD.

My other gorbies will split and head towards p44 and p422. Lighter ships will either be towed by gorbies or will hold position this turn in case of mine expansion (probably I will tow 1 ssd with each group). I will provide exact coordinates later, but you can assume gorbie 342 headed towards p44 and gorbie 354 towards p422 if you want to intercept.

I'm thinking the meteor should tow one FCC SE to around (1230,1103) in orer to come back in just over 81 ly from p394 and open up another attack point quickly.

What do you think?

FCC #67 will go to the WW I think as we do not want to lose the connection right now I would say. Since it looks like Lizard will be transferring planets to Bird the cluster of p273 is likely to become very ground-assaultable, so I think we may actuall want to chunnel IN top FCC 67 soon and push south so you can clear mines away and set up cloaked ground assaults on what will then be bird planets. Will gift STF to you if you agree its best the FCC stays in the WW

H-ross #335 to p501 with 60 fighters confirmed

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
FCC 67 at p 19 rather damaged by GD. Chunnel away together with STF 193 or going to ww? If going to ww I can load 240 supplies to FC 67 (FC 67 to transfer clans to STF 193 to make room in that case and STF 193 gifted to me).

H-Ross 335 to p 501 please with 60 fighters.

More later (10 - 12 hrs from now).

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
Lizards giving away planets would not be nice.

Regarding backdoor: perhaps you can transfer one or more Gorbies (low ID) to me to have defending ships with planetary immunity?
Where will your ships go over there? Already splitting up a bit to speed things up? And what would be the best direction(s) for the Fury ships in view of your moves?

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: Just spoke with Nocere.  Apparently lizard is planning to give his planets away to Bird and Colonies.  This is a serious threat if he can do it fast (and rather bad form IMO).  Means we really need to push our backdoor attack on Colonies to keep them from reaching 250.

mymessages.headline: The Evil Empire (koshling)
mymessages.body: That was decent

notes.body: get population for amorph and p345
