hulls.description: The Lizards have equipped the Vendetta B with a cloaking device.

hulls.name: Banshee Class Destroyer
hulls.special: Radiation Shielding - Will not lose crew or colonists from Star Cluster radiation.

hulls.name: Deth Specula Class Frigate
hulls.special: Radiation Shielding - Will not lose crew or colonists from Star Cluster radiation.

hulls.name: D19b Nefarious Class Destroyer
hulls.special: Glory Device, Radiation Shielding - Can self destruct doing 1 mine hit worth of damage to all enemy ships at a location. Will not lose crew or colonists from Star Cluster radiation.

hulls.name: Firecloud Class Cruiser
hulls.special: Chunnel Initiator, Chunnel Target - Can produce a wormhole in space between two Firecloud Class Cruisers allowing any ship to pass instantly from one to the other.

hulls.name: Super Star Destroyer
hulls.special: Imperial Assault, Planet Immunity - Drop 10 clans on any planet from this ship and the planet will be captured.  Can not be attacked by planets.

hulls.name: Banshee B Class Destroyer
hulls.special: Radiation Shielding - Will not lose crew or colonists from Star Cluster radiation.

hulls.name: Deth Specula Armoured Frigate
hulls.special: Radiation Shielding - Will not lose crew or colonists from Star Cluster radiation.

hulls.name: D19c Nefarious Class Destroyer
hulls.special: Glory Device, Radiation Shielding - Can self destruct doing 1 mine hit worth of damage to all enemy ships at a location. Will not lose crew or colonists from Star Cluster radiation.

hulls.name: Wild Banshee Class Destroyer
hulls.special: Radiation Shielding - Will not lose crew or colonists from Star Cluster radiation.

hulls.name: Deth Specula Stealth
hulls.special: Recloak Intercept, Radiation Shielding - If undamaged, will recloak immediately and remove primary enemy after a cloak intercept attack only attacking the intercept target. Will not lose crew or colonists from Star Cluster radiation.

hulls.name: Deth Specula Heavy Frigate
hulls.special: Radiation Shielding, Advanced Cloak - Will not lose crew or colonists from Star Cluster radiation. Does not require fuel to cloak.

hulls.name: Brynhild Class Escort
hulls.special: Bioscan - Will detect 20% of all native life when Sensor Sweeping.

hulls.name: Resolute Class Battlecruiser
hulls.special: Advanced Cloak - Does not burn fuel while cloaked and can cloak in ion storms.

hulls.name: Tantrum Liner
hulls.special: Tantrum Device - Charges in Ion Storms to release a kinetic blast.

hulls.name: Lorean Class Temporal Lance
hulls.special: Temporal Lance - Can open a rift in the fabric of space, projecting itself and ships traveling with it forward through time and space. When activated, ships traveling in a temporal lance will disappear from the map, to reappear at a different location turns in the future.

hulls.name: Loki Class Destroyer
hulls.special: Tachyon Device - Will decloak any cloaked enemy ship within 10 ly.

hulls.name: Saber Class Frigate
hulls.special: Glory Device, Radiation Shielding - Can self destruct doing 1 mine hit worth of damage to all enemy ships at a location. Will not lose crew or colonists from Star Cluster radiation.

hulls.name: Onyx Class Frigate
hulls.special: Terraform Ship - Will raise planet temperature by 1 each turn until it reaches 100.

hulls.name: Chameleon Class Freighter ©
hulls.special: Chameleon Device - Can appear to be any type of ship. (10 fuel/turn to operate)

hulls.name: Selenite Class Battlecruiser
hulls.special: Move Minefields - Can move minefields using the Push Minefield and Pull minefield missions.

hulls.name: Hikos Armored Trailer
hulls.special: Trailer - No engines. Cannot move under its own power or intercept.

hulls.name: Aggregator Class Interdictor
hulls.special: Interdictor - Interdict Mission prevents ships with hull mass lower than the interdiction field strength from moving away. Prevents all towing within the active field range.

hulls.name: Saber Class Shield Generator
hulls.special: Shield Generator, Glory Device, Radiation Shielding - Will provide an additional 25% shields and invoke a 50% engine shield generator in any ship owned by the same player at its location (up two 2 Sabers at the same time) based on the engines of the boosted ship. Can self destruct doing 1 mine hit worth of damage to all enemy ships at a location. Will not lose crew or colonists from Star Cluster radiation.

hulls.name: Red Wind Storm-Carrier
hulls.special: Cloaked Fighter Bays, Advanced Cloak - While cloaked this ship will add its fighter bays and fighters to other fighter ships owned by the same officer fighting in the same location. Max 1 Red Wind. Does not require fuel to cloak.

hulls.name: Pyrite Class Frigate
hulls.special: Sunburst Device - Will raise temperature of target planet within 200ly by up to 2 degrees. Can heat by targeting warp wells.

hulls.name: Neutronic Refinery Ship
hulls.special: Alchemy Ship - Converts 1 supply and 1 mineral to 1 neutronium (fuel).

hulls.name: Enlighten Class Research Vessel
hulls.special: Educator - Raises native government levels by 5% per turn (4 turns per government level) to a maximum of Representative.

hulls.name: D9 Usva Class Stealth Raider
hulls.special: Radiation Shielding, Stealth Armor - Will not lose crew or colonists from Star Cluster radiation. Limited ship visibility dependent on warp speed, with the ship less visible at lower speeds.

hulls.name: Madonnzila Class Carrier ©
hulls.special: Chameleon Device - Can appear to be any type of ship. (10 fuel/turn to operate)

hulls.name: Iron Lady Class Command Ship
hulls.special: Command Ship - All ships at the location of the command ship which are not intercepting will move before enemy ships and before minelaying. Ships will still fight after all other ships have moved.

hulls.name: Dark Wing Class Battleship
hulls.special: Advanced Cloak - Does not burn fuel while cloaked and can cloak in ion storms.

hulls.name: Victorious Class Battleship
hulls.special: Radiation Shielding - Will not lose crew or colonists from Star Cluster radiation.

hulls.name: Merlin Class Alchemy Ship
hulls.special: Alchemy Ship - Converts 3 supplies to 1 mineral.

hulls.name: Dungeon Class Stargate
hulls.special: Stargate, Chunnel Stabilizer - Allows any ship to chunnel to any other stargate or valid chunnel target. Allows ships in the surrounding area to initiate chunnels while moving.

hulls.name: Zilla Class Battlecarrier
hulls.special: Emorks Spirit Bonus - Fights with one extra fighter bay for each homeworld controlled. Survives up to 149% damage against planets.

hulls.name: Galactic Trade Station
hulls.special: Enables starbase money transfer on starbases within 100ly and enables the exchange of megacredits to gigacredits. Must be away from a planet and not move to be active. Maximum tow speed of warp 3.

hulls.name: Trade Station
hulls.special: Enables starbase money transfer on starbases within 100ly. Must be away from a planet and not move to be active. Maximum tow speed of warp 3.

hulls.name: Trade Station
hulls.special: Enables starbase money transfer on starbases within 100ly. Must be away from a planet and not move to be active. Maximum tow speed of warp 3.

hulls.name: T-Rex Class Battleship ©
hulls.special: Chameleon Device - Can appear to be any type of ship. (10 fuel/turn to operate)

hulls.name: Bloodfang
hulls.special: Stealth Armor - Limited ship visibility dependent on warp speed, with the ship less visible at lower speeds.

hulls.name: Bloodfang Corruptor
hulls.special: Disruption Field - Cyber weapon which causes enemy ship computer systems to reset, forcing them to initiate a fight with beams/torps discharged and fight with 2 less fighter bays. Solar Federation is immune.

advantages.name: Fed Crew Bonus
advantages.description: Fed ships will fight with an extra 50kt of hull mass, fighter ships will fight as if they have 3 extra fighter bays, damaged Fed ships will fight with all their weapons and 25% shields are recovered between fights.

advantages.name: 200% Taxing
advantages.description: The Solar Federation is very good at making friends with the natives that they contact. They collect twice the megacredits per turn per tax rate percentage point from both the natives and the colonists.

advantages.name: Super Refit
advantages.description: Federation starbases may upgrade the parts on Federation owned ships after they are built.

advantages.name: 70% Mining
advantages.description: Due to regulations protecting the environment and native life the Federation can only mine at 70% of normal rates.

advantages.name: Lizard Crew Bonus
advantages.description: Lizard ships can take up to 150% damage before blowing up.

advantages.name: 30X Ground Combat
advantages.description: Clans dropped on enemy planets will fight at a ratio of 30 to 1.

advantages.name: 15X Ground Defense
advantages.description: Clans defending a planet will fight at a ratio of 15 to 1.

advantages.name: Hisssss!
advantages.description: The Lizard Hissss! ship mission prevents civil wars through fear. Native and colonist happiness +5 per Hissss!

advantages.name: Super Spy
advantages.description: Birdman ships may spy on enemy planets and gather resource information and friendly codes.

advantages.name: Super Spy Deluxe
advantages.description: Birdman ships may change an enemy planetary friendly code. (20% chance per ship)

advantages.name: Pillage Planet
advantages.description: Fascist ships with beam weapons may plunder natives and colonists for money and supplies (1 MC and 1 supply per 10000 colonists or natives), killing them in the process.

advantages.name: 15X Ground Combat
advantages.description: Clans dropped on enemy planets will fight at a ratio of 15 to 1.

advantages.name: 5X Ground Defense
advantages.description: Clans defending a planet will fight at a ratio of 5 to 1.

advantages.name: Rob Ship
advantages.description: Privateer ships have the ability to Rob enemy ships of their fuel and cargo.

advantages.name: 3X Beam Crew Kill
advantages.description: Privateer beam weapons will kill 3X more crew than regular beams.

advantages.name: Tow Capture
advantages.description: Ability to capture a ship which has no fuel just by towing it.

advantages.name: Assimilation
advantages.description: Assimilation of natives at a rate of 100% per turn.

advantages.name: Recover Minerals
advantages.description: Recover minerals and fuel from the hull of defeated enemy ships.

advantages.name: Repair Self
advantages.description: Ships may repair themselves in space at a rate of 10% per turn while stopped.

advantages.name: Web Mines
advantages.description: The ability to lay web space minefields up to 150ly in radius that entrap enemy ships and drain their fuel.

advantages.name: Desert Worlds
advantages.description: Colonists grow faster on desert planets.

advantages.name: Dark Sense
advantages.description: Ability to dark sense all enemy planets and their mineral information within 200 ly.

advantages.name: 5 Free Starbase Fighters
advantages.description: 5 free fighters are produced at each starbase each turn only using the minerals.

advantages.name: 4X Mine Laying
advantages.description: Torpedos are converted into 4X as many mine units.

advantages.name: Build Fighters
advantages.description: Ships with fighter bays may build fighters in their cargo bays using only the minerals + 5 supplies each.

advantages.name: Rebel Ground Attack
advantages.description: Can sabotage enemy planets destroying structures and creating civil war.

advantages.name: Dark Sense Defense
advantages.description: Can not be detected by Dark Sense

advantages.name: Planet Immunity
advantages.description: Can not be attacked by planets.

advantages.name: Fighter Mine Sweep
advantages.description: Can sweep enemy minefields up to 100 ly away using fighters at a rate of 20 mines per fighter even in ion storms.

advantages.name: Arctic Planet Colonies
advantages.description: The Rebels can put a colony of up to 90000 clans on an arctic planet without harm.

advantages.name: 200% Mining
advantages.description: 200% mining rate.

advantages.name: Loki Immunity
advantages.description: Cloaked ships are not decloaked by Lokis.

advantages.name: Diplomatic Spies
advantages.description: Birdman ambassadors are excellent spies. For any race where you have sent an ambassador you will be notified of any diplomatic relation changes. Note: This may get your ambassadors rejected.

advantages.name: Red Storm Cloud
advantages.description: Allows two Red Storm Class Carriers to be used at the same time.

advantages.name: Plunder Planet
advantages.description: Increases the supplies and megacredits earned from Pillage Planet by 2.5X.

advantages.name: 2X Faster Beams
advantages.description: Beam weapons are tuned to fire two times faster than normal.

advantages.name: Ion Starbase Shield
advantages.description: Ion shielding on starbases enable ships at those starbases to be safe from ion storms. They will not be dragged or damaged, but they will uncloak.

advantages.name: Starbase Money Transfer
advantages.description: Ability to transfer money between starbases using the Send Money and Receive money starbase missions. Starbases set to Send Money will send all the available megacredits on the planet to any starbases with the Receive Money command set. The megacredits will be evenly divided between any receiving starbases.

advantages.name: Starbase Mine Laying
advantages.description: Ability to lay mines (or web mines if the webmine advantage is active) from starbases.

advantages.name: Starbase Mine Sweeping
advantages.description: Beam weapons from starbases are able to sweep mines or web mines.

advantages.name: Starbase Fighter Sweeping
advantages.description: Fighters from starbases are able to sweep mines up to 100 ly away. Web minefields can not be swept by fighters.

advantages.name: Energy Defense Field
advantages.description: Planets without starbases and at least 20 defense posts can generate an energy defense field which prevents orbital attacks by ships. Planets with an energy defense shield can only be captured by ground combat or imperial assault. Falcon Class Escorts which are located on planets with an energy defense field can land on the planet and can not be attacked or seen (they are cloaked by the defense shield). It takes 25 fuel per turn to run an energy defense field. It can be activated using the planetary friendly code EDF.

advantages.name: Fighter Patrol Routes
advantages.description: Evil Empire Starbases which are less than 200ly apart have the ability to link together to form a blockade which is patrolled by fighters. Enemy ships can not pass through the patrol route without being detected and attacked by the fighters (even cloaked). The attack is the equivalent of a fighter wave attack by all of the fighters involved in the blockade. First fighters will be shot down by the beam weapons on the ship (2 per beam weapon) then all remaining fighters will strike the ship reducing its shield and doing damage. Set starbase mission to Fighter Patrol. Maintaining a patrol requires 10 fuel/turn per connection for the high definition sensor arrays used to detect passing ships. Patrols become active or stop functioning after movement and are visible to other players who perform a Sensor Sweep within range of one of the involved starbases. The number of fighters involved in a patrol is the number of fighters on each of the connecting starbases divided by the number of patrols the starbase is involve

advantages.name: Destroy Planet
advantages.description: The Gorbie Class BattleCarrier has the ability to blow up a planet and turn it into a debris disk. The Gorbie must have Heavy Phasers, Transwarp Drives, a full tank of fuel and no damage. It must move within 10ly of the target planet (the nearest planet will be targetted) but not inside the Warp Well and set the Destroy Planet misssion. When the mission is set to Destroy Planet any ship within a 300 ly radius will recieve a notice that the ship has powered the death ray and is preparing to destroy the planet, the Gorbie will be set to warp 0 and may not move. The weapon will fire the following turn after movement and combat and all fuel will be used except 1. Any ships within 3 ly of the planet are destroyed immediately and any large ships not permitted to be inside of the debris disk will be destroyed. If other nearby planets are caught in the explosion they will be destroyed as well (a chain reaction).

advantages.name: Star Cluster Radiation Immunity
advantages.description: The Robots are immune to star cluster radiation.

advantages.name: Debris Disk Defense
advantages.description: Ships larger than 200kt can travel inside a debris disc but risk hitting an asteroid. The faster the ship flies the greater the chance of hitting an asteroid. Each asteroid hit does the equivalent of one mine hit of damage.

advantages.name: Improved Desert Habitation
advantages.description: The Crystalline colonists grow even faster on hot worlds (2.5X faster on 100 degree planets), but slower on cool worlds.

advantages.name: Lay Large Minefields
advantages.description: The ability to lay deep space minefields up to 150 ly in radius.

advantages.name: Lay Minefields
advantages.description: The ability to lay deep space minefields up to 100 ly in radius.

advantages.name: Super Spy Command
advantages.description: Super spy deluxe with the additional option of setting a planetary friendly code to NTP which will prevent the fighters on a planet or starbase from launching. Requires Super Spy Deluxe to be active.

advantages.name: Clone Ships
advantages.description: The ability to clone captured ships for twice the cost as normal before the ship limit is reached.

advantages.name: Advanced Cloning
advantages.description: The ability to clone captured ships for twice the cost as normal as part of the normal build queue. If advanced cloning is active any time a starbase is scheduled to build it will check for a ship set to clone before doing a normal build. The starbase still can not build twice build turn. Requires Clone Ships advantage to be active.

advantages.name: 4 Free Starbase Fighters
advantages.description: 4 free fighters are produced at each starbase each turn only using the minerals. May be combined with other free fighter advantages.

advantages.name: 3 Free Starbase Fighters
advantages.description: 3 free fighters are produced at each starbase each turn only using the minerals. May be combined with other free fighter advantages.

advantages.name: 2 Free Starbase Fighters
advantages.description: 2 free fighters are produced at each starbase each turn only using the minerals. May be combined with other free fighter advantages.

advantages.name: 1 Free Starbase Fighter
advantages.description: 1 free fighter is produced at each starbase each turn only using the minerals. May be combined with other free fighter advantages.

advantages.name: Starbase Fighter Transfer
advantages.description: Ability to transfer fighters between starbases or Gorbies using the Send Fighters and Receive Fighters missions. Starbases and Gorbies set to Send Fighters will send all the available fighters to any starbase or Gorbie within 200ly which has a Receive fighters mission set. Or you can set it to send to a specific target, in which case the receiver does not need to use the Receive Fighters mission.

advantages.name: Dark Detection
advantages.description: Ability to dark sense enemy ships within 10ly. Regardless of being on a planet or cloaked. This does not decloak the enemy ship or give details as to the type of ship.

advantages.name: Super Spy Advanced
advantages.description: Super spy mission will report on starbases. Information returned on fighters, defenses and damage, tech levels, and ship being built.

advantages.name: Cloak and Intercept
advantages.description: The Cloak and Intercept mission allows any of your ships with cloaking devices to remain cloaked while performing an intercept. If your ship also sets a primary enemy to match your intercept target, it will engage them in combat before the regular combat phase. If it survives that combat and has no damage, it will immediately recloak so it will not enter combat with any other ships or planets.

advantages.name: Ship Building Planets
advantages.description: Horwasp planets can build ships/pods with no limit.

advantages.name: Swarming
advantages.description: Clans on board Horwasp ships are scattered to nearby planets.

advantages.name: Rock Attacks
advantages.description: Horwasp planets can launch asteroids at enemy worlds causing great damage.

advantages.name: Reduced Diplomacy
advantages.description: Horwasps can not engage in normal diplomatic relations with the other races.

advantages.name: Psychic Scanning
advantages.description: Horwasps use their psychic hive mind abilities to detect enemy vessels regardless of their environmental or cloaking status.

advantages.name: Rob Fighters
advantages.description: When robbing, Privateer carriers will rob fighters from ships and starbases with a 10% chance to steal each fighter. Each stolen fighter has a 50% chance of making it back to the robbing vessel.

advantages.name: Hardened Mines
advantages.description: Minefields cannot be swept by fighters.

advantages.name: Build Clans
advantages.description: Any ship can use the Build Clans mission to create a clan from 1 supply and 1 mineral.

advantages.name: Dense Minefields
advantages.description: Robots can lay minefields with more than 22500 mine units. While not increasing the radius beyond 150 ly, these fields will grow denser, with increased mine hit and mine decay rates.

advantages.name: Hide In Warp Well
advantages.description: Ships with hull mass less than 60 kt can use the Hide mission to to reduce their visibility to 1 ly in warp wells.

advantages.name: Enhanced Recycle
advantages.description: When recycling a ship, get 75% of the production points it would cost to build the ship.

advantages.name: Pleasure Planets
advantages.description: Landing and disassembling a Lady Royale on a 50 degree planet will create a pleasure planet. These planets have increased colonist happiness, with slightly reduced native happiness. Planetary factory and mine production is halved. All planets within 250 ly of the pleasure planet are made aware of it, and their colonists will slowly start to emigrate there to enjoy the good life. Cyborg, Robot, Crystal, and Horwasp are immune to this temptation. Lady Royales parked over a pleasure planet generate twice as many megacredits.

advantages.name: Internal Temp Regulation
advantages.description: Colonist populations grow on every planet as if the temperature was 50 degrees.

advantages.name: Galactic Power
advantages.description: Gorbies always fight from the left hand side

advantages.name: Minefields Save Fuel
advantages.description: Fuel cost reduced by 20% when travelling in own minefields.

advantages.name: Quantum Torpedos
advantages.description: Can equip the powerful quantum torpedos. Stronger in combat with extended range, but lay mines like Mark VIIIs and cannot be scooped.

advantages.name: Shock Troops
advantages.description: Clans dropped on enemy planets will fight at a ratio of 5 to 1.

advantages.name: Fortress
advantages.description: Clans defending a planet will fight at a ratio of 5 to 1.

advantages.name: Super Spy Infiltration
advantages.description: When super spying at a starbase the weapons, cargo and FC of all ships in orbit (matching the starbase owner) will become known. Requires Super Spy Advanced active.

advantages.name: Covert Data Link
advantages.description: Any friendly code that you have previously scanned on an enemy planet has a chance of still working. 100% for codes scanned this turn dropping by 10% per turn.

advantages.name: Harmonic Weapon Modulation
advantages.description: If ship matches enemy friendly code in combat, enemy will fight without shields. When enabled, matching friendly codes will not prevent combat.

advantages.name: Hidden Minefields
advantages.description: Can lay hidden minefields that cannot be scanned or swept until a mine has been hit. Cost twice as many torpedos.

advantages.name: Call To Hive
advantages.description: Hives can use call mission to summon 1% of clans for planets within 100ly. Cannot move or be towed while calling clans.

advantages.name: Stack Ships
advantages.description: Can combine two small ships with matching equipment into one larger one. Ships must be undamaged, in the same location, and cannot move the turn they stack.

advantages.name: Improved Fuel Economy
advantages.description: Ships use 30% less fuel for normal movement.

advantages.name: Red Wind Robs Fighters
advantages.description: Robs fighters as long as there is cargo space just like any normal rob mission. The Red Wind will not rob other types of cargo. Can not rob from starbases, only other ships.

activebadges.name: Minor Victory
activebadges.description: Diplomatic Win - Complete the victory countdown, or place first in a Fixed Turn game where the countdown is not completed.
